rules_metadata.name: Cross-field & structural validation rules
rules_metadata.purpose: Rules that span multiple fields, records, or whole chains — not expressible in stateless JSON Schema. The review agent executes these after per-record JSON-Schema validation passes.

rules.rule: reporting_year >= 2020 OR confidence in ['low','estimated','not_available']
rules.message: Headline quantitative figure must be dated 2020+ or explicitly flagged low/estimated.

rules.rule: if D1.06.value and D1.07.value present, D1.08 (trade balance/dependency) must reconcile within 5% tolerance
rules.message: Trade balance/import-dependency must be consistent with import and export values.

rules.rule: count(D9.02.value == 'binding') >= 1
rules.message: Each chain must identify at least one binding constraint.

rules.rule: count(D9.06.value == 'quick_win') >= 1
rules.message: Each chain must have at least one quick win.

rules.rule: count(D9.03 records) >= 1
rules.message: Each chain must identify at least one opportunity/upgrading option.

rules.rule: count(D10.01 records) >= 1
rules.message: Each chain must define at least one priority investment opportunity.

rules.rule: every D9.05 action record has a matching D9.06 type, D9.07 timeframe, D9.08 responsible actor
rules.message: Every priority action must be typed, timed, and owned.

rules.rule: every D9.01 constraint references >=1 populated field in domains D2-D8
rules.message: Every constraint must trace to a constraint-domain finding.

rules.rule: every high-priority D9.05 action references >=1 D9.01 constraint
rules.message: Every priority action must address a named constraint.

rules.rule: every D10.02 rationale references >=1 of D1.06/D1.08/D1.09
rules.message: Every investment rationale must tie to demand or import-substitution evidence.

rules.rule: if any D10 opportunity present, D10.03 and D10.04 populated with collection_notes documenting assumptions
rules.message: CAPEX/OPEX must carry documented assumptions.

rules.rule: D9.04 scoring criteria and scale identical across all 9 value chains
rules.message: Prioritization scoring must be consistent across every chain.

rules.rule: D0.03 node map contains nodes: input_supply, production, processing, distribution, end_market
rules.message: Value chain map must cover all standard nodes.

rules.rule: D1.05 employment has gender disaggregation_values present OR collection_notes explaining absence
rules.message: Employment must be gender-disaggregated or the gap explained.

rules.rule: every field with required_level=='mandatory' is either populated (value present) or not_available==true with collection_notes
rules.message: No mandatory field may be silently empty.

rules.rule: D1.12 value must contain an explicit chain-of-reasoning (not a simple 10x multiplication) AND must state a projected value with unit AND must reference at least one structural driver (e.g. infrastructure demand, urbanisation, income effect, industrialisation linkage)
rules.message: 2040 Uganda demand projection must use Tenfold Growth logic, not a simple multiplication. Show the structural reasoning.

rules.rule: count(D9.09.value == 'directly_enables_tenfold') >= 1 AND count(D9.09.value == 'misaligned') == 0
rules.message: Every chain's priority matrix must have at least one action that directly enables tenfold growth, and zero misaligned actions.

rules.rule: if ingestion_method=='trusted_source' then trusted_source_id must be in trusted_sources.json AND field_id must appear in that source's authoritative_for list
rules.message: A trusted source may only be used for the fields it is registered as authoritative for.

rules.rule: if ingestion_method=='upload_mining' then source_document_ref must be non-null and include filename plus locator (page/sheet/cell)
rules.message: Every upload-mined datapoint must be traceable to the source document and location.

rules.rule: if ingestion_method=='web_gap_fill' then source_url must be non-null AND approval_status must be 'approved' before synthesis agent may use it
rules.message: Web gap-fill data requires a source URL and PR-merge approval before use.
